INV.MAKER_CHECKER.PR_ONLY.description: Mutating actions are only allowed on PR branches.

INV.FINGERPRINT.MATCH_HERMETIC.description: Execution fingerprint must match hermetic policy constraints.

INV.NETWORK.NO_EGRESS_HERMETIC.description: No network egress is allowed when policy zone is hermetic.

INV.SECRETS.NONE.description: Secrets must not be present in payloads, logs, or artifacts.

INV.POLICY_ZONING.REVIEW_QUORUM.description: Policy zoning decisions must include review quorum evidence.

INV.ARTIFACTS.DETERMINISTIC.description: Artifact generation must be deterministic for identical inputs.
